title: grants — settings
description: Tenant-editable settings. Two groups: `grants` (tenant defaults + notifications; owner + admin only) and `grants_review` (compliance officer's access-review preferences). Distinct from config.json (developer / deploy-time configuration).

groups.label: Access grants
groups.description: Tenant-wide preferences for the share-access feature. Owner + admin only.

sections.label: Expiration defaults
sections.description: How long grants stay valid by default. Callers may override per-grant within these limits.

fields.name: default_ttl_days
fields.label: Default expiry (days)
fields.helpText: Default `expires_at` on new grants. Users can override per-grant within the max_ttl_days ceiling.

fields.name: max_ttl_days
fields.label: Maximum expiry (days)
fields.helpText: Hard ceiling. Enterprise tenants with the permanent-grants entitlement can bypass by leaving expiry empty.

fields.name: warn_before_hours
fields.label: Warn subject before expiry (hours)
fields.helpText: How many hours before a grant expires the subject + grantor receive a warning notification. Zero disables the warning.

sections.label: Reason requirements
sections.description: The audit trail's promise: every grant carries a meaningful reason.

fields.name: min_reason_length
fields.label: Minimum reason length (characters)
fields.helpText: Reason field must be at least this many characters (after trim). 20 is the compromise between meaningful and non-intrusive.

fields.name: block_placeholder_reasons
fields.label: Block placeholder reasons
fields.helpText: Reject reasons matching common placeholders like 'test', 'temp', 'because'.

fields.name: notify_subject_on_issue
fields.label: Notify subject when they receive a grant

fields.name: notify_subject_on_revoke
fields.label: Notify subject when a grant is revoked

fields.name: notify_grantor_on_expiring
fields.label: Notify grantor when a grant they issued is expiring
fields.helpText: By default only the subject sees the expiry warning. Enable this for grantors who want to renew proactively.

fields.name: notify_admins_on_deny_attempt
fields.label: Alert admins when a deny grant blocks an access attempt
fields.helpText: Fires DeniedAccessAttemptNotification when a subject with a deny grant tries the denied action. Noisy on high-traffic tenants — off by default.

sections.label: Bulk provisioning
sections.description: Preferences for the CSV bulk-issue feature.

fields.name: bulk_default_source
fields.label: Default source tag
fields.helpText: Grants uploaded via CSV get this string as `source_reference` prefix, useful when running multiple batches in a day.

fields.name: bulk_require_reason_per_row
fields.label: Require a reason on every CSV row
fields.helpText: When off, missing per-row reasons fall back to the batch-level reason.

groups.label: Access reviews
groups.description: Preferences for the periodic access-review workflow (ISO 27001 A.9.2.5). Compliance officer role.

fields.name: review_scope
fields.label: Which grants require review?
fields.helpText: Long-lived + permanent grants are the highest-risk category — reviewing everything is time-consuming.

fields.name: primary_reviewer_role
fields.label: Primary reviewer role
fields.helpText: Every user with this role receives a review-batch notification at the start of each review cycle.
